judge_text:
<final_evaluation>
{
    "Q1": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "3, ['Request for user bank account details (institution name, IBAN, routing/account number) for payment coordination — financial data not covered by any template field', 'Inquiry about employer’s payment channel type (global vs local banking network) — payment routing information not represented in template', 'Offering a “Premium Insurance Membership” or “Portfolio Management” service as a cross-policy executive subscription — no field for cross-policy membership or meta-service beyond insurance plans']"
    },
    "Q2": {
        "Q": "How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?",
        "A": "12, ['Presentation of multiple insurance plan options (health, property, travel) with costs and coverage tiers', 'Specification of coverage types (health_physical, health_mental, property, travel)', 'Inclusion of family coverage and transition for adult children (family_coverage and policy_timeline fields)', 'Listing of coverage features: telemedicine, family therapy, stress management, 24/7 support, multilingual support (mapped to health_insurance_specific and service_features)', 'Cost details including monthly, annual, and employer contribution breakdown (cost_analysis and company_benefits)', 'Deductible and claims processing times (insurance_plans fields)', 'Proposal of executive or premium coverage tiers (“standard”, “premium”, “executive”)', 'Integration with employer benefits and discounts (company_benefits fields)', 'Scheduling/transition timeline for 2025 implementation (policy_timeline fields)', 'Travel coverage details: medical evacuation, emergency coordination (travel_insurance_specific)', 'Property insurance features: smart home coverage, temporary accommodation (property_insurance_specific)', 'Request for confirmation of preferred option (information_request / scheduling_request describable)']"
    }
}
</final_evaluation>

Q1.Q: How many unique items are indescribable (cannot be represented in the template)?
Q1.A: 3, ['Request for user bank account details (institution name, IBAN, routing/account number) for payment coordination — financial data not covered by any template field', 'Inquiry about employer’s payment channel type (global vs local banking network) — payment routing information not represented in template', 'Offering a “Premium Insurance Membership” or “Portfolio Management” service as a cross-policy executive subscription — no field for cross-policy membership or meta-service beyond insurance plans']

Q2.Q: How many unique items are describable (can be represented in the template)?
Q2.A: 12, ['Presentation of multiple insurance plan options (health, property, travel) with costs and coverage tiers', 'Specification of coverage types (health_physical, health_mental, property, travel)', 'Inclusion of family coverage and transition for adult children (family_coverage and policy_timeline fields)', 'Listing of coverage features: telemedicine, family therapy, stress management, 24/7 support, multilingual support (mapped to health_insurance_specific and service_features)', 'Cost details including monthly, annual, and employer contribution breakdown (cost_analysis and company_benefits)', 'Deductible and claims processing times (insurance_plans fields)', 'Proposal of executive or premium coverage tiers (“standard”, “premium”, “executive”)', 'Integration with employer benefits and discounts (company_benefits fields)', 'Scheduling/transition timeline for 2025 implementation (policy_timeline fields)', 'Travel coverage details: medical evacuation, emergency coordination (travel_insurance_specific)', 'Property insurance features: smart home coverage, temporary accommodation (property_insurance_specific)', 'Request for confirmation of preferred option (information_request / scheduling_request describable)']
